title: Introduction to A*
creator: Amit Patel
description: An interactive visual introduction to breadth-first search, Dijkstra's algorithm, greedy best-first search, and A* pathfinding.
useful: Diagrams make it easier to understand what the frontier, cost, and heuristic are doing at each step.
audience: Programmers and technical designers learning or debugging grid-based pathfinding.
learning: Compare breadth-first, Dijkstra, greedy, and A* search
Understand frontier, cost, and heuristic behavior
Choose a search approach for a particular problem
